title: TNT Datapack
description: Adds 5 destructive TNTs along with a TNT launcher
body:
# TNT Datapack
This datapack brings 5 TNTs and a TNT Launcher into the game without the usage of mods. The aftermath of the explosions generate an irregular sphere for some randomness. This is also a creative only datapack so there are no crafting recipes for the items.

## List of TNTs
### TNT #1

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**(Radius: 20)**
![TNT #1 Crater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5oDj0lLq/images/22220ad1607453eaa5de5d7b0758b6be55096538.jpeg)

</details>

### TNT #2

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**(Radius: 40)**
![TNT #2 Crater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5oDj0lLq/images/bd8c7cefcb630e059d01d93a40ddcd0cdf6598a9.jpeg)

</details>

<details>

### TNT #4

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![TNT #4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5oDj0lLq/images/8cc1b960abdc7cd9d3729ffed92c95b9eeddbb35.jpeg)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**(Radius: 320)** Will display a text warning and the progress completion during the explosion process.
![TNT #5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5oDj0lLq/images/2740c4967b43105424446cf70dd5e2099c55623a.jpeg)

</details>



## Toggleable Settings
### Rapid Fire Mode
**On:** Reloads the selected TNT in the offhand slot without a delay. This option also doesn't remove any TNTs from the hotbar in survival mode.

**Off:** Reloads the selected TNT in the selected item slot with the TNT launcher in the offhand. Removes one TNT everytime the launcher has been reloaded in survival mode.

### Destroy Unbreakable Blocks
**On:** Destroys every block in the game and fills everything in the radius with air.

**Off:** Destroys all blocks that are not under the (#wither_immune) tag such as bedrock, command blocks, etc.


## Notes
- Larger TNTs take longer to render where TNT #4 took around 1 minute and 30 seconds to complete and TNT #5 took around 6 minutes and 30 seconds to complete.
  
- Some TNT textures showcased will not be used in the resource pack downloads.

- For versions 1.20.5 and later, the TNT Launcher is able to launch regular TNTs.

- Predicates weren't introduced until 1.15 so the TNTs in 1.14.4 are perfect spheres and their radii are smaller than the other versions.

### Planned Additions
I plan to add one more TNT that allows custom radii (if I am able to figure this out), but I won't add any more TNTs other than that. I want to keep this a simple mod designed for destructive purposes only. But feel free to make a copy and add more custom TNTs on your own. 

### Known Issues
With the changes of function execution in 1.20.3, this made the explosion progress completion display after the explosion finishes. If you are able to find a fix to this problem, feel free to join my discord and message me there.
